signals.npcLine: Market cap bleeding, shadows creep over cryptos.
signals.questPulse: Scan for dying assets, salvage what's left.
signals.worldFeed: Global crypto grid flickers under fear's grip.
signals.clueEvent: Data nodes show mass selloffs in ghost chains.

signals.npcLine: AI tokens spike, a chance to hack the system.
signals.questPulse: Exploit AI asset rising before it crashes.
signals.worldFeed: Rumors of AI-driven pump cycles hitting markets.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter hints at AI asset manipulations.

signals.npcLine: PLUME clusters scatter, trace their fading signatures.
signals.questPulse: Decode fading PLUME signals for hidden value.
signals.worldFeed: PLUME tokens dropping signals, anomaly detected.
signals.clueEvent: Network logs reveal strange PLUME transaction bursts.

signals.npcLine: SOL energy flickers; miners brace for power shifts.
signals.questPulse: Secure unstable SOL nodes before blackout hits.
signals.worldFeed: SOL nodes unstable in current market chaos.
signals.clueEvent: Power grids linked to SOL token volatility spike.

signals.npcLine: Blend network's mixing gear jammed, suspicious activity.
signals.questPulse: Investigate BLEND interference, possible sabotage attempts.
signals.worldFeed: Blend liquidity hits sudden freeze, insiders wary.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted logs show unusual access near BLEND mixers.
